name: Herbed Stuffed Eggs#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the eggs lengthwise.
2. Scoop out the yolks into a large bowl and set the egg white halves aside.
3. Mash the yolks in the bowl.
4. Blend in the cheese spread, mayonnaise, scallions (sliced), pimentos, and mustard until smooth.
5. Spoon or pipe the yolk mixture back into the egg white halves.
6. Garnish with sliced scallions.
7. Serve.
